title: Seplat Energy Empowers Media Professionals through Capacity Building Program - FinancialEDGE
description: Seplat Energy Plc, in collaboration with Eloh Consulting Limited, hosted a two days stakeholders engagement, themed "Media Entrepreneurs Programme," in Lagos. The program aimed to enhance the skills and knowledge of media professionals, equipping them to effectively navigate the complexities of the industry. Prominent media personalities, including Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director, Financial Edge, and Friday
html: Seplat Energy Plc, in collaboration with Eloh Consulting Limited, hosted a two days stakeholders engagement, themed “Media Entrepreneurs Programme,” in Lagos.
